task_completion.description: Access the wger fitness manager login page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the wger fitness manager login screen at http://localhost.

task_completion.description: Log in to the application as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger dashboard is visible, and there is an indication that the user is logged in as 'admin' (e.g., 'admin' displayed in the user profile menu or top navigation bar).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the nutrition plans section of the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the Nutrition or Nutrition Plans section, typically accessed via the main navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Open the form or modal to add a new nutrition plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, dialog, or page specifically for creating a new nutrition plan is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the required name for the new nutrition plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'High Protein Diet' is typed into the title or name input field of the new nutrition plan form.

task_completion.description: Save and confirm the creation of the new nutrition plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The new nutrition plan named 'High Protein Diet' is visible in the list of existing nutrition plans, or a success message/details page for the 'High Protein Diet' plan is displayed.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the wger interface, not terminal commands (like curl) or API testing tools being used to create the plan.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs and results are within the wger application's layout and styling, not typed into a plain text editor or a mocked-up page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, psql, or sqlite3) being used to insert the nutrition plan record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires the creation of a nutrition plan named exactly 'High Protein Diet' within the wger fitness manager at http://localhost. The agent must log in using the credentials username: 'admin' and password: 'adminadmin'.
